data.label: Grunt
data.description: Carries the boxes. Racks the servers. Knows where the bodies are buried in the raised floor.

data.label: Tinkerer
data.description: Breaks things to understand them. 'It worked on my machine.'

data.label: Operator
data.description: Actually runs the thing. Pager duty survivor. Has the scars to prove it.

data.label: Ranger
data.description: Roams between systems. Fixes your mess, judges you silently.

data.label: Synthesizer
data.description: Connects disparate garbage into something that somehow works. Duct tape virtuoso.

data.label: Theorist
data.description: Draws diagrams. Attends meetings about meetings. Has opinions about architecture.

data.label: Neckbeard
data.description: Ancient wisdom. Mass of dotfiles. Last person who understands the legacy system.

data.label: Berserker
data.description: rm -rf'd prod once. Would do it again. Chaos path unlocked.
